===Magical Pokémon Journey===
[[File:Misty MPJ.png|thumb|200px|Misty in Magical Pokémon Journey]]
Misty, along with {{Ash}} and {{an|Brock}}, make cameo appearances in bonus chapters of [[Magical Pokémon Journey]]. In the bonus chapters, Misty and her friends have mistakenly wandered into the world Magical Pokémon Journey is set in. The bonus chapters chronicle their attempts to return to their world (of the {{pkmn|animated series}}) and their encounters with various aspects of the Magical Pokémon Journey [[canon]] which differ from the animated series' canon (such as the use of [[Poké Ball]]s).
{{-}}
